title: Danthonia calicina
taxonomy: Danthonia calicina is classified as a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the tribe Danthonieae and the genus Danthonia. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and genetic relationships with other plants. Danthonia calicina is also known as a cool-season grass, which means it grows best in temperate climates with moderate temperatures. Its classification as a species of grass is further supported by its growth habit and morphology.
